mapper.insert: insert into equity_index_dividend_yield_daily (id, equity_index, equity_index_name, `date`, dividend_yield, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{equityIndex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equityIndexName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{date,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dividendYield,jdbcType=REAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update equity_index_dividend_yield_daily set equity_index = #{equityIndex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, equity_index_name = #{equityIndexName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `date` = #{date,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dividend_yield = #{dividendYield,jdbcType=REAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select id, equity_index, equity_index_name, `date`, dividend_yield, create_time, update_time from equity_index_dividend_yield_daily where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
select id, equity_index, equity_index_name, `date`, dividend_yield, create_time, update_time from equity_index_dividend_yield_daily
mapper.insert: insert ignore into equity_index_dividend_yield_daily (equity_index, equity_index_name, `date`, dividend_yield, create_time, update_time) values (#{equityIndex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{equityIndexName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{date,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{dividendYield,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
